comments: Known males associating with a flock of Velvet and Common Scoter off the old scrapes. Flew in very close at one point. Photographed.

Carrying a fish in its beak.

Est.

Est.
All the males seen seem to be moulting into eclipse.

Est.

Continuing male birds seen in scoter flock.

Continuing birds, one group seen far off with the two Surfs, another group was seen flying over the Esk Mouth, briefly.

comments: 3 present for a few days, seen today
Common off Musselburgh lagoons. Summer flock, mostly males.
2AD, 1ON near back of seaward part of pnd; 4JUV w/ 1AD in back pond near willows

Mother with three walking but still natal downy chicks. Two more fledglings in the Chinese garden. One more mother on nest at Chinese garden with two tiny young, likely just hatched based on wet natal down, bald head and wings. One more egg in nest at least, and father feeding mother.
